strengths: 19 years of software engineering experience exceeds the 15-year requirement with deep technical breadth across web, mobile, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains
Founder of open-source GISCollective platform demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and ability to build products from vision to adoption by organizations like Green Map
Current staff role at re:cinq with hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work shows emerging engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; AI expertise is recent and lacks demonstrated track record of strategic AI platform or product leadership
Career trajectory predominantly hands-on engineering and architecture rather than director-level strategic advisory—no evidence of advising enterprise customers on AI/cloud adoption
GISCollective, while entrepreneurial, is a geo-data platform without explicit AI differentiation; no recognized AI products or platforms demonstrating strategic impact

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI strategy or advisory leadership experience
Recent AI-agent infrastructure engagement without proven depth
Strong engineering foundation and founder experience in adjacent domains

response.justification: Bogdan is a capable and experienced engineer with the required years and technical depth, and his current role signals emerging AI interest. However, the position seeks a director-level strategic thinker with demonstrated expertise in AI platform strategy and the ability to advise enterprise partners on disruptive AI adoption—areas his resume does not substantiate. He appears positioned as a hands-on staff engineer, not a strategic innovator focused on AI differentiation. The recent AI work is promising but insufficient to offset the lack of formal AI education and strategic advisory background.
